channel.title: Blogs on RizPur
channel.description: Recent content in Blogs on RizPur

item.title: What My Cat's Camera Was Doing Behind My Back
item.description: We got a cat. Her name is MiMi, and we also got a cheap WiFi camera so we could watch her destroy things while not home. The camera came in a generic white box, had a QR code on the bottom, and cost 12 euros from China. You know the type. Setting it up was simple. Download the Skyworth app, scan the QR code, connect to WiFi. Done. That’s where the first interesting thing happened.

item.title: Between Yam, Baguette, and Noodles
History of Jamaica
item.description: In 2021, amid global challenges, I taught English in France to young minds from kindergarten (CP) to grade 5 (CM2). Their curiosity about Jamaica sparked an enchanting video project. Join this post to delve into our journey during unprecedented times. Through a crafted video, we embarked on a virtual exploration of Jamaica’s historical richness, culture, and heartwarming cross-border connections.
